/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests_playlists.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/MediaPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/Song.cpp.o -o unit_tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 -lsfml-audiosfml-window _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
